items.author: PowerfulJRE
items.content:

https://www.3of7project.com

items.author: PowerfulJRE
items.content:

founding member of Community and Law Enforcement Assisted Recovery (CLEAR), a recovery oriented community policing methodology. 

He shares ideas of his own and doesn't claim to represent the beliefs of his employer, organizations, and/or city.

https://lawenforcementactionpartnership.org
